competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Features & Positioning

**Core Positioning:**
GitHub Copilot is described as "Your AI pair programmer" and "Your AI accelerator for every workflow, from the editor to the enterprise."

**Key Capabilities:**
- Code completion and inline suggestions across multiple IDEs
- Chat assistance in editors and on GitHub.com
- Agent mode for autonomous task execution
- CLI integration for terminal-based workflows
- Code review functionality
- Security vulnerability detection and fixes

**Major Features:**
The platform emphasizes "Go beyond one-size-fits-all" by supporting multiple LLMs optimized for different needs. Users can "Use your agents, your way" through custom agents, GitHub Copilot, or third-party options. It "Stay[s] in your flow" across GitHub, IDEs, project tools, and chat applications.

**Supported Environments:**
Available in VS Code, Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Xcode, Neovim, Eclipse, and other platforms.

**Pricing Tiers:**
- Free: 2,000 completions and 50 monthly requests
- Pro: $10/month with unlimited suggestions
- Pro+: $39/month with access to advanced models

**Business Impact:**
Marketing claims highlight "up to 75% higher satisfaction with their jobs" and "up to 55% more productive" for developers using Copilot.

changes.description: 主标语增加「Your AI pair programmer」，从「工作流加速器」向「结对编程伙伴」双重定位演化；「Use your agents, your way」出现，从具名 agent（Claude/Codex）转向开放 agent 平台定位
changes.evidence: 「GitHub Copilot is described as 'Your AI pair programmer' and 'Your AI accelerator for every workflow'」；「Users can 'Use your agents, your way' through custom agents, GitHub Copilot, or third-party options」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：开放 agent 选择定位强化「AI = 快 session，人在 agent 图内」框架，但尚无同协议信号

changes.description: 「Stay in your flow」新强调跨 GitHub、IDE、项目工具、chat 的无缝流转；上期明确提及的 Copilot Spaces 在本次抓取中未见
changes.evidence: 「Stay in your flow across GitHub, IDEs, project tools, and chat applications」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Peripheral 层诉求——跨工具不切焦点；但未见 live link 或 session 级协作新证据

key_findings: 定位从「加速器」演化为「pair programmer + 开放 agent 平台」双轨，「Use your agents, your way」替代了 Agents on GitHub 的具名品牌
Copilot Spaces 在本次抓取中未见，需下次监测是否已下线、改名或移至其他页面
定价结构明确：Free 2,000 completions/50 requests，Pro $10，Pro+ $39/month
